title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.158 - Payments to be made only when federal grants-in-aid are provided
text:
208.158.  Payments to be made only when federal grants-in-aid are provided. — Payments of medical assistance in federally aided programs shall be made only during such times as grants-in-aid are provided or made available to the state on the basis of the state plan approved by the federal government for medical assistance pursuant to provisions of the Federal Social Security Act, as amended.
(L. 1967 p. 325)
